---
id: suggest-translation-memory
title: "Get suggestions from translation memory"
description: "Suggests machine translations from translation memory. The result is always sorted by similarity, so sorting is not supported."
sidebar_label: "Get suggestions from translation memory"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get suggestions from translation memory"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/suggest/translation-memory"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Suggests machine translations from translation memory. The result is always sorted by similarity, so sorting is not supported.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
